_comment: Urban wardrobe pack. Style reset for the medieval European town district wardrobe.

packStyle.name: 城鎮街區 Urban Town Wardrobe
packStyle.reference: pretty refined medieval town fashion for town girls, merchant daughters, workshop apprentices, bookshop girls and market walks; beautiful but practical
packStyle.linework: tidy fitted practical silhouettes, easy to walk in, modest skirt volume, layered coats and jackets
packStyle.mood: refined, clever, lively, everyday, urban, slightly mature
